from: Col. Hélder Sampaio, MMC (Engineering & Mining Liaison)
introBody: Pilot. Sampaio. Phobos desk, Engineering & Mining.
Cowboys handler vouched. Recorded. Mars line logged. Enough to open the door — not enough to hand you keys.
1. Turret mount first. No mount, no Corps board access. Engineering bay at the Mars spaceport — U at the terminal.
2. You work our giver line, not tourist runs. MMC board, posted on Mars only.
3. Stack builds in order. Five hardware boxes, each followed by a field proof. Do not skip the sequence.
4. Finish clean: double pay on every Mars-issued contract you take after, plus manifold certification — your shuttle locks to the posted orbital corridors instead of guessing the line.
Tap Accept or Decline. No follow-up from me either way.

steps.subject: OP 1 — INSTALL TURRET MOUNT
flavor: Pilot. Hardware first. Dock at the Mars spaceport, terminal, U for the engineering bay. Buy the turret mount. Mining beam rides on the shuttle hull — fired from orbit, not the surface. No mount, no MMC board access. File already green from the Cowboys end? Good. We keep moving.

steps.subject: OP 2 — FIRST MMC MINING RUN
flavor: Mount is live. Now use it. Mars mission board, MMC giver line — pull one mining contract. Burn to the rock, hold orbit, fire the beam, fill the hold from up there. Lander stays docked on this kind of work. Clean close. Receipt on file.

steps.subject: OP 3 — CARGO BAY UPGRADE, TIER III
flavor: Drill-grade work needs drill-grade capacity. Engineering bay, U at the terminal. Cargo bay to tier three — bigger hold, more ore per closeout, fewer return trips. No room in the hold, no room in the cohort.

steps.subject: OP 4 — CARGO PROOF, MARS MINING RUN
flavor: Bigger hold means nothing without a receipt. One mining contract off the Mars board — any giver. Top the hold off before you break orbit. Partial loads do not file. Clean close.

steps.subject: OP 5 — FOCUS ARRAY UPGRADE, TIER III
flavor: Engineering bay, U at the terminal. Focus array to tier three. Beam goes where you put it — tighter cone, more yield per shot, less spray on the rock. Belt debris is not a suggestion. Install and prove it.

steps.subject: OP 6 — FOCUS ARRAY, FIELD PROOF
flavor: Array is installed. Now earn it. One mining contract off the Mars board, run with the tuned beam. Tight grouping, full hold, clean closeout. Hardware is nothing without receipts.

steps.subject: OP 7 — COOLING LOOP UPGRADE, TIER III
flavor: Engineering bay, U. Cooling loop to tier three. Beam stays on the rock longer between heat-outs — uninterrupted fire is the difference between a full hold and a half closeout. Cook your emitter in a hot zone, you are a beacon for every pirate board from here to Kuiper. Install. Test. Fly.

steps.subject: OP 8 — COOLING LOOP, FIELD PROOF
flavor: Emitter stays cold under load or it does not count. One mining contract off the Mars board, sustained beam. Come back intact and with a full hold.

steps.subject: OP 9 — POWER REGULATOR UPGRADE, TIER III
flavor: Engineering bay, U. Power regulator to tier three. Less fuel burned per beam-second, longer trigger pulls between recharges. Discipline in the bus, discipline in the tank. Last hardware box. Do not get clever.

steps.subject: OP 10 — MANIFOLD QUALIFICATION RUN
flavor: Final evolution. Full stack — tuned beam, big hold, cold emitter, regulator under control. One mining contract off the Mars board, run from orbit, deliver to the Mars bay. Deploy lander with F only if the target site demands surface work. Clean close, full hold, hull intact. I sign the cohort file when the receipt lands.

completionBody: Pilot. Good work. Cohort is yours.
MMC ledger shows you cleared every op in sequence. Double pay on Mars-issued contracts is live — every Mars-board ticket pays out at twice the listed rate from here on.

Manifold certification filed. Open the map with M and the posted orbital corridors render along each planet's lane — your shuttle locks to them on approach instead of guessing the line. Faster transfers, lower fuel cost, fewer surprises.
You are a contractor the Corps can use. Keep the hull in one piece.
